title: BuildingRecord
description: Canonical in-memory representation of a building assessed during earthquake response. Shared by Module A (codec), Module B (digital-twin/shadow), and Module D (forensic-audit). Coordinates are always signed floats — negative lat = south, negative lon = west.

id.description: Short alphanumeric building identifier, max 6 chars (codec wire format constraint).

lat.description: WGS-84 latitude in signed decimal degrees. Negative = south hemisphere.

lon.description: WGS-84 longitude in signed decimal degrees. Negative = west of prime meridian.

status.description: Structural assessment: green=safe, yellow=damaged/assess, red=blocked/unsafe, unknown=not yet assessed.

heightM.description: Estimated building height in metres. Used by Module B for shadow length calculation.

anomaly.description: True only when an operator has manually flagged a discrepancy via the in-app anomaly form. Must NOT be set by any automated scraper or external API call.
